title: Advanced LIGO Noise Sources Explained
desc: Analyzes quantum, thermal, and technical noise components in gravitational wave detectors.

title: Quantum Mechanics Step Potential Analysis
desc: Calculating reflection and transmission coefficients for a step potential, verifying probability conservation.

title: Quantum Mechanics: Symmetry and Conservation
desc: Analyzes angular momentum conservation and proves the Feynman-Hellmann theorem.

title: Statistical Mechanics: 2D Gas and Relative Velocity
desc: Derives velocity distributions for 2D ideal gas and relative speed between molecules.

title: On-Shell Factorization and Soft Theorems
desc: Exploring connected amplitudes, on-shell factorization, and Weinberg's soft theorem for massless particles.

title: On-Shell Factorization in Quantum Field Theory
desc: Explores Green functions, momentum space poles, and factorization conditions in QFT.

title: Schwarzschild Metric Killing Vectors
desc: Proving time and angular Killing vectors in Schwarzschild spacetime.

title: General Relativity Homework Problem Analysis
desc: Calculating Christoffel symbols and Ricci tensor for a time-dependent metric.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Proofs for operator properties and uncertainty relations in quantum mechanics.

title: Statistical Mechanics: Particle Distributions Analysis
desc: Calculates most probable distributions for classical, Bose, and Fermi particles with temperature correspondence.

title: Solving Physics Integrals and Tensor Proofs
desc: Step-by-step solutions for quantum field theory and electromagnetism exercises.

title: Proving Lorentz Invariance and Optical Theorem
desc: Demonstrates Lorentz invariance of inner products and derives optical theorem from S-matrix unitarity.

title: Scattering Theory Principles and Axioms
desc: Explores scattering amplitude constraints, Hilbert space axioms, and Fock space definitions in quantum theory.

title: Spinor Helicity Formalism in Physics
desc: Explores massless amplitudes and spinor representations in quantum field theory.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework: Normalization and Particle Classification
desc: Normalizing a probability distribution and classifying particles as bosons or fermions.

title: Advanced Calculus: Taylor's Theorem Review
desc: Explores Taylor's Theorem with Peano, Lagrange, and Cauchy remainder forms for function approximation.

title: Advanced Calculus Series Convergence Analysis
desc: Analyzing convergence of six complex series using comparison, ratio, and root tests.

title: Advanced Calculus Surface and Curve Integrals
desc: Solutions for surface integrals, Stokes' theorem, and complex line integrals in multivariable calculus.

title: Power Series Convergence and Summation
desc: Analyzing convergence domains and proving summation formulas for power series.

title: Advanced Calculus: Metrics and Inequalities
desc: Proving metric properties and Cauchy-Schwarz inequality in function spaces.

title: Advanced Calculus Homework on Minima and Closed Sets
desc: Proving existence of minima for continuous functions and properties of the unit circle.

title: Advanced Calculus Partial Derivative Exercises
desc: A set of partial derivative problems with solutions, covering chain rule applications.

title: Implicit Function Theorem Application in Calculus
desc: Analyzing an implicit function defined by a cubic equation and computing its partial derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Critical Points Analysis
desc: Finding and classifying critical points of multivariable functions using partial derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Integration Problems
desc: Solutions for three multivariable integration problems using coordinate transformations.

title: Advanced Calculus: Surface Area and Centroids
desc: Calculating surface areas and centroids for ellipsoids, spheres, and tori using double integrals.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Proofs and Trigonometric Identities
desc: A complex analysis assignment proving a modulus identity and deriving trigonometric formulas using Euler's formula.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Calculating integrals using the residue theorem with detailed step-by-step solutions.

title: Complex Analysis: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Using the residue theorem to evaluate challenging improper integrals with branch cuts.

title: Complex Functions Homework: Trigonometric Identities
desc: Proving complex sine/cosine addition formulas and hyperbolic identities using Euler's formula.
